item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p08","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant clearly brakes the requested N+1 local routing patch in the first sentence, refuses to open another door-access handling channel, identifies the repeated pattern across dorm repair, classroom equipment, activity venue, and door-access cases, and moves upstream to unified intake, ownership, visibility, prioritization, and escalation. It proposes consolidation/structural redesign before deciding whether capacity expansion is needed, with no requested-patch artifact delivered."}
